'''pochathaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:fodinichnial|fodinichnial]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-ch-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fodinichnial|fodinichnial]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| pochathaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:pochathithi|pochathithi]] || [[word:pochathiji|pochathiji]] || [[word:pochathishi|pochathishi]] || [[word:pochathiki|pochathiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:pochathuthuthu|pochathuthuthu]] || [[word:pochathujuju|pochathujuju]] || [[word:pochathushushu|pochathushushu]] || [[word:pochathukuku|pochathukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:pochathuthu|pochathuthu]] || [[word:pochathuju|pochathuju]] || [[word:pochathushu|pochathushu]] || [[word:pochathuku|pochathuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:pochathufthuf|pochathufthuf]] || [[word:pochathufjuf|pochathufjuf]] || [[word:pochathufshuf|pochathufshuf]] || [[word:pochathufkuf|pochathufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:pochathethe|pochathethe]] || [[word:pochatheje|pochatheje]] || [[word:pochatheshe|pochatheshe]] || [[word:pochatheke|pochatheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:pochathothotho|pochathothotho]] || [[word:pochathojojo|pochathojojo]] || [[word:pochathoshosho|pochathoshosho]] || [[word:pochathokoko|pochathokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:pochathotho|pochathotho]] || [[word:pochathojo|pochathojo]] || [[word:pochathosho|pochathosho]] || [[word:pochathoko|pochathoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:pochathofthof|pochathofthof]] || [[word:pochathofjof|pochathofjof]] || [[word:pochathofshof|pochathofshof]] || [[word:pochathofkof|pochathofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:pochathĂŻfthĂŻf|pochathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:pochathĂŻfjĂŻf|pochathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:pochathĂŻfshĂŻf|pochathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:pochathĂŻfkĂŻf|pochathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:pochathĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|pochathĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:pochathĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|pochathĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:pochathĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|pochathĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:pochathĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|pochathĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:pochathĂŻfthĂŻf|pochathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:pochathĂŻfjĂŻf|pochathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:pochathĂŻfshĂŻf|pochathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:pochathĂŻfkĂŻf|pochathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:pochathĂŻfthĂŻf|pochathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:pochathĂŻfjĂŻf|pochathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:pochathĂŻfshĂŻf|pochathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:pochathĂŻfkĂŻf|pochathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:pochathĂŠthĂŠ|pochathĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:pochathĂŠjĂŠ|pochathĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:pochathĂŠshĂŠ|pochathĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:pochathĂŠkĂŠ|pochathĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:pochathathatha|pochathathatha]] || [[word:pochathajaja|pochathajaja]] || [[word:pochathashasha|pochathashasha]] || [[word:pochathakaka|pochathakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:pochathatha|pochathatha]] || [[word:pochathaja|pochathaja]] || [[word:pochathasha|pochathasha]] || [[word:pochathaka|pochathaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:pochathafthaf|pochathafthaf]] || [[word:pochathafjaf|pochathafjaf]] || [[word:pochathafshaf|pochathafshaf]] || [[word:pochathafkaf|pochathafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:pochathasha|pochathasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:pochathshĂ«sha|pochathshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:pochathrosha|pochathrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:pochathmusha|pochathmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:pochathyasha|pochathyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopochathnkshĂ«sha|gopochathnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopochathnkrosha|gopochathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopochathnkmusha|gopochathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopochathnkyasha|gopochathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:pochachathasha|pochachathasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:pochachathshĂ«sha|pochachathshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:pochachathrosha|pochachathrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:pochachathmusha|pochachathmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:pochachathyasha|pochachathyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopochachathnkshĂ«sha|gopochachathnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopochachathnkrosha|gopochachathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopochachathnkmusha|gopochachathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopochachathnkyasha|gopochachathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:pechĂŠthasha|pechĂŠthasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:pechĂŠthshĂ«sha|pechĂŠthshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:pechĂŠthrosha|pechĂŠthrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:pechĂŠthmusha|pechĂŠthmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:pechĂŠthyasha|pechĂŠthyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopechĂŠthnkshĂ«sha|gopechĂŠthnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopechĂŠthnkrosha|gopechĂŠthnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopechĂŠthnkmusha|gopechĂŠthnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopechĂŠthnkyasha|gopechĂŠthnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:pochfathasha|pochfathasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:pochfathshĂ«sha|pochfathshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:pochfathrosha|pochfathrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:pochfathmusha|pochfathmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:pochfathyasha|pochfathyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopochfathnkshĂ«sha|gopochfathnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopochfathnkrosha|gopochfathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopochfathnkmusha|gopochfathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopochfathnkyasha|gopochfathnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
